data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Uses encryption to protect user data both at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: Employs TLS and AES encryption standards.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Strict IAM controls to safeguard user access and permissions.
data.technical_spec: Uses OAuth 2.0 for secure authentication processes.

data.title: Threat Detection Systems
data.description: Real-time monitoring for potential security threats.
data.technical_spec: Integrations with SIEM systems for anomaly detection.

data.title: Security Incident Response
data.description: A defined process to handle security incidents efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Incident response team follows a well-documented protocol.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic audits to ensure security measures are up-to-date.
data.technical_spec: Vulnerability scans and penetration testing executed frequently.
